title: Al-Mujahidiyah Madrasa
summary: Al-Mujahidiyah Madrasa (Arabic: الْمَدْرَسَة الْمُجَاهِدِيَّة, romanized: al-Madrasah al-Mujāhidīyah)  is a madrasa complex in Damascus, Syria. Built in 1142 by Burid governor Mujahid al-Din bin Bazan bin Yammin al-Kurdi.
text: Al-Mujahidiyah Madrasa (Arabic: الْمَدْرَسَة الْمُجَاهِدِيَّة, romanized: al-Madrasah al-Mujāhidīyah)  is a madrasa complex in Damascus, Syria. Built in 1142 by Burid governor Mujahid al-Din bin Bazan bin Yammin al-Kurdi.
